data.title: World Liberty Financial Collaborates with Spacecoin on Satellite-Powered DeFi Initiative
data.description: World Liberty Financial, a company linked to U.S. President Donald Trump, has announced a partnership with Spacecoin to launch a satellite-powered decentralized finance (DeFi) project. According to BWEnews, this collaboration aims to leverage satellite technology to enhance the capabilities and reach of DeFi services. The initiative is expected to bring innovative solutions to the financial sector, utilizing advanced technology to improve accessibility and efficiency in decentralized finance operations. The market capitalization of World Liberty Financial is reported to be $4750 million, although this figure may not be accurate.

data.title: Zcash Faces Challenges Following Executive Departures
data.description: Zcash has experienced a significant decline following the departure of key executives from its nonprofit creator, the Electric Coin Company. According to NS3.AI, the former core team has initiated a new privacy-focused project named cashZ, which has led to criticism of the new leadership at ECC. Despite the changes, market sentiment and on-chain metrics suggest there is still some demand for Zcash. However, its long-term outlook will largely depend on the effectiveness of the new leadership and broader macroeconomic conditions.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Predicted to Grow by 40% Annually, Says Circle CEO
data.description: Jeremy Allaire, CEO of Circle, predicts a 40% annual growth rate for the stablecoin market, driven by its integration into the global banking system. According to NS3.AI, Allaire highlighted at the World Economic Forum that stablecoins, such as USDC, are evolving from experimental tools to essential components of financial infrastructure. This transformation is increasing transaction volumes among banks and payment networks, with the expectation that all financial entities will eventually become part of the stablecoin ecosystem.

data.title: Ex-Binance CEO ‘talking with probably a dozen governments‘ about tokenization
data.description:
Former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao said at the World Economic Forum in Davos that he is advising several governments on tokenizing state assets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/changpeng-zhao-governments-tokenization-davos?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Judge Criticizes Cryptocurrency's Risk and Threat to Monetary Systems
data.description: Judge Jed Rakoff has expressed concerns about cryptocurrency, labeling it as inherently risky due to its operation outside government control. According to NS3.AI, Rakoff views cryptocurrency as a potential threat to established monetary systems that are under state supervision. However, the article highlights Bitcoin's creation as a response to failures in the financial system, designed to offer monetary sovereignty without reliance on central authorities. Recent trends indicate a growing acceptance and custody of Bitcoin by institutions and tens of millions of Americans, suggesting a shift towards financial autonomy that transcends traditional court and regulatory oversight.

data.title: Bitwise Launches BPRO ETF to Hedge Against Currency Debasement
data.description:
Bitwise Asset Management has launched the Bitwise Proficio Currency Debasement ETF (BPRO) on the New York Stock Exchange, introducing an actively managed product designed to hedge against the long-term erosion of fiat currency purchasing power. The fund blends traditional hard assets with digital scarcity, reflecting Bitwise’s view that currency debasement remains a persistent macro risk.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitwise-launches-bpro-etf-to-hedge-against-currency-debasement/

data.title: Pi Network enables the use of AI prompting for integrating Pi Payment into apps
data.description:
Pi Network’s App Studio has introduced AI prompting for seamless Pi payment integration into apps. The update eliminates traditional SDK requirements, enabling non-experts to build payment features into their applications without hassle. According to the announcement, users can now generate fully functional app components and payment integrations through AI prompts. Developers can easily embed, secure, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pi-network-enables-the-use-of-ai-prompting/

data.title: Platinum Prices Reach Record High Amid Market Dynamics
data.description: Spot platinum prices experienced a notable surge, increasing by 3% intraday to reach an unprecedented all-time high of $2558.20 per ounce. According to NS3.AI, this significant milestone highlights the current dynamics in the commodities market, driven by strong demand or tightening supply affecting the precious metal. The rise in platinum prices underscores the shifting trends and factors influencing the market.

source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitgo-ipo-signals-wall-streets-growing-appetite-for-crypto-infrastructure/

data.title: Ondo: BitGo tokenized shares to be launched on chains such as Solana
data.description: Ondo Finance will offer tokenized BitGo shares through Ondo Global Markets within hours of BitGo's listing on the New York Stock Exchange. The tokenized asset will be listed on Solana, Ethereum, and BNB Chain. Since its launch in September 2025, Ondo Global Markets has become the world's largest tokenized securities platform by assets under management, with a total value locked of approximately $466 million and a cumulative trading volume exceeding $6.4 billion.
